meta.title: ICS4ICS – Megan Samford
meta.description:
Megan Samford introduced the concept of Incident Command System for ICS at S4x20. In those two years, ISAGCA took up the charge of making it a reality. 

In this talk Megan introduces the concept, why it is needed, and importantly the results from the first in-person ICS4ICS exercise that took place two days before this keynote. Some progress:
- over 1000 global volunteers
- first round of credentialing completed
- working hand-in-hand with FEMA/DHS
- first exercise (with forms, structure, etc) completed
